name: Prismatic Spray
description: Eight multicolored rays of light flash from your hand. Each ray is a different color and has a different power and purpose. Each creature in a 60-foot Cone makes a Dexterity saving throw. For each target, roll 1d8 to determine which color ray affects it: 1-Red (10d6 Fire damage, half on save), 2-Orange (10d6 Acid damage, half on save), 3-Yellow (10d6 Lightning damage, half on save), 4-Green (10d6 Poison damage, half on save), 5-Blue (10d6 Cold damage, half on save), 6-Indigo (on fail Restrained then Petrified), 7-Violet (on fail Blinded then transported to another plane), 8-Special (struck by two rays, roll twice, rerolling 8s).
